description: CompositionBlack foldaway capris made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has an elasticated waistband and brand embroidery on the left side on the waistbandFitRegularWash careHand or machine wash cold with a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm ironThese capris from urban yoga have a breathable fabric, and a soft waistband.
